title: Cobblemon: Redone Shinies
description: Adds 100+ new shiny designs to your Cobblemon world!
body:
![A logo for the addon that says "Cobblemon Redone Shinies" in bright yellow text.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3775e7590f08f7217c5760ad31721bfc85163ace.png)

---

**Cobblemon: Redone Shinies** is a pack for **[Cobblemon 1.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)** that aims to redesign many shinies to make them easier to notice or give some fun new colourings to switch things up. As of now, the pack offers over **100+ new shinies** to the game, with plans to add many more!

*This addon also includes support and shines for other popular addons, such as [Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) & [Navas' ZA Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega). Other addons are planned to be supported in the future.*

## Shinies Included:

<details>
<summary>Cobblemon</summary>

  - Vulpix & Ninetales
- Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon, Glaceon, & Sylveon
- Snorunt, Glalie, & Froslass
- Togepi, Togetic, & Togekiss
- Dusclops & Dusknoir
- Plusle & Minun
- Gible, Gabite, & Garchomp
- Minccino & Cinccino
- Pansage & Simisage
- Pansear & Simisear
- Panpour & Simipour
- Ponyta & Rapidash
- Popplio, Brionne, & Primarina
- Pichu, Pikachu, & (Alolan) Raichu
- Cyndaquil, Quilava, & (Hisuian) Typhlosion
- Ghastly, Haunter, & Gengar
- Tinkatink, Tinkatuff, & Tinkaton
- Archen & Archeops
- Cleffa, Clefairy, & Clefable
- Meowth & Persian
- Ralts, Kirlia, Gardevoir, & Gallade
- Rookidee, Corvisquire, & Corviknight
- Absol
- Larvesta & Volcarona
- Chingling & Chimecho
- Slowpoke & (Galarian) Slowking
- Dragonite
- Snivy, Servine, & Serperior
- Oshawott, Dewott, & (Hisuian) Samurott
- Joltik & Galvantula
- Sprigatito, Floragato, & Meowscarada
- Nidoqueen
- Scyther
- Igglybuff, Jigglypuff, & Wigglytuff
- Vanillish & Vanilluxe
- Torchic, Combusken, & Blaziken
- Abra, Kadabra, & Alakazam
- Onix
- Seel & Dewgong
- Diglett & Dugtrio
- Munchlax & Snorlax
- Sewaddle, Swadloon, & Leavanny

</details>

<details>
<summary>Built-in Resource Packs</summary>

  - Pichu & Pikachu [Alolan]
- Cyndaquil & Quilava [Hisuian]
- Oshawott & Dewott [Hisuian]

</details>

<details>
<summary>Mega Showdown</summary>
  
  - Mega Gengar
- Mega Glalie
- Mega Garchomp
- Mega Gardevoir
- Mega Gallade
- Mega Absol

</details>

<details>
<summary>Navas' ZA Megas</summary>
  
  - Mega Absol Z
- Mega Chimecho
- Mega Froslass 
- Mega Clefable
- Mega Garchomp Z
- Mega Dragonite
- Mega Alakazam

</details>

---

This addon will not work with other addons or mods that modify the same textures. It will also break with most cosmetic mods or addons. This is not an issue I can fix.  

---

_Shinies within this pack are free to use within your own addons, modpacks, servers, designs, and so on. You do not need to ask to use them nor do you need to credit me. However, **you may not make money from them in any way**._
